AI Design System · TGR Theme

Style Guide

Source of truth: Figma → tokens.json → design-tokens.ts

Colors — Semantic

Brand & Surface

brandPrimary

#1e1e1e

brandSecondary

#ffffff

surfacePrimary

#f8f8f8

surfaceSecondary

#f4f1ee

surfaceDisabled

#aeaeae

text

#1e1e1e

textSecondary

#aeaeae

textDisabled

#f8f8f8

error

#b6475f

warning

#cd644c

success

#478978

info

#76a4c4

border

#ebebeb

borderHover

#1e1e1e

link

#1e1e1e

linkHover

#76a4c4

formfieldBackground

#ffffff

formfieldBorderColor

#ebebeb

formInputPlaceholder

#aeaeae

#f4f1ee

announcementsBarText

#1e1e1e

#ffffff

#bedff7

panelHeaderBackground

#f4f1ee

Colors — Button Variants

primary
bg: #1e1e1e · text: #ffffff
secondary
bg: #ffffff · text: #1e1e1e
a2c
bg: #1e1e1e · text: #ffffff
preview
bg: #f0ece4 · text: #00205b
disabled
bg: #aeaeae · text: #f8f8f8
link
bg: #ffffff · text: #1e1e1e

Typography

Main font

Lato — The quick brown fox

Secondary font

BigCaslon — The quick brown fox

Headlines

headline1

40px / 48px · w400 · mob 30px

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

headline2

28px / 36px · w400 · mob 20px

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

headline3

28px / 36px · w400 · mob 20px

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
